auth.login_subtitle: Your personal space for mental well-being
auth.login_description: Welcome! Mind Tracker helps you keep track of your daily moods and provides AI-powered insights to help you understand your patterns.

dashboard.logged_today: You've already logged your mood today. Great job!
dashboard.not_logged_today: You haven't logged your mood today yet.

insight.title: Mind Insight
insight.no_data: Start journaling to get personalized insights!
insight.try_first: Try logging your first entry today.

new_entry.title: New Entry
new_entry.write_first_error: Write something first to get tag suggestions.
prompts: What's one thing you're grateful for right now?
What challenged you today and how did you handle it?
Describe how your body is feeling right now.
What's on your mind that you haven't said out loud?

history.title: History
history.no_entries: No entries found for this mood.
history.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?

stats.title: Stats
stats.subtitle: Your mood patterns and trends
stats.no_trend_data: Not enough data for a trend yet. Keep logging!
stats.no_data: Not enough data to show stats yet. Keep journaling!
